confirm_remove_sp_approval: Tango i te whakaaetanga a te Perehitini? Ka mukua te rā me te āhua whakaaetanga.
error_admin_only: Ko ngā kaiwhakahaere anake e āhei ana ki te kōpaki i ngā tūāhua.
error_not_found: Kāore i kitea tēnei tūāhua ki te kōpaki.
login_tagline: Mai i te whakaaroaro ki te wehewehe
login_enter_code: Tāurua te waehere i tukuna ki tō īmēra:
login_code_instruction: Tāurua te waehere mai i tō īmēra, ka tono rānei i tētahi hou.
login_checking: E tāke ana i te rēhitatanga...
login_unregistered_email: Kāore tēnei wāhitau īmēra i rēhitatia. Tūtohu ki tētahi kaiwhakahaere.
login_sending_code: E tuku ana i te waehere...
login_check_email: Tirohia tō īmēra mō te waehere 6-mati ({mode} papaarorau).
login_session_expired: Kua mutu te hūnga. Tīmata anō mai i te tīmatanga.
login_invalid_code: He waehere hē, kua pau rānei. Me matua whakamōhio koe ka whakamahi i te waehere hou rawa atu i tukuna ki tō īmēra mō te {mode} papaarorau.
login_err_email_not_confirmed: Kei te tū tēnei kaiwhakamahi, engari kāore anō tōna īmēra i whakaaetia i Supabase Auth.
login_err_otp_disabled: Kua whakakore i te OTP īmēra i ngā tautuhinga Whakamana Supabase.
login_err_signup_disabled: Kua whakahohea te takiuru rōpū-kati, ā, kei te karo a Supabase ki te hanga, ki te whakamahi rānei i tētahi rēhita hou mō tēnei īmēra.
login_err_rate_limit_email: He nui rawa atu ngā īmēra takiuru i tukuna ki tēnei wāhitau. Tatari ake, ka ngana anō.
login_err_rate_limit_requests: He nui rawa atu ngā ngana takiuru mai i tēnei kaihoko. Tatari ētahi meneti, ka ngana anō.
login_err_email_not_authorized: Kāore e āhei ana te kaiwhakarato īmēra o Supabase ki te tuku ki tēnei wāhitau. Tirohia tō tautuhinga SMTP/kaiwhakarato.
login_err_backend: I tūpono he hapa i muri o Supabase Auth. Ki te neke-ā-ringa i tāpirihia tēnei kaiwhakamahi ki auth.users, hangaia anōtia mā te marautanga whakarato kaitiaki kia tika ai tōna tohu īmēra me te āhua whakaaetanga.
login_err_no_identity: Kāore a Supabase i kitea tētahi tohu whakamana īmēra mō tēnei wāhitau. Tērā pea kei roto te kaiwhakamahi i auth.users engari kāore anō he tohu īmēra tika, he īmēra whakaaetia rānei.
login_err_generic: Kāore e āhei ana ki te tuku i te waehere takiuru ināianei.
fatal_missing_config_detail: Me tautuhia VITE_SUPABASE_URL me VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY mō tēnei hanga.
fatal_load_error: Kāore i āhei ki te uta i ngā raraunga tono
fatal_fetch_members: Kāore te tono i āhei ki te tiki i ngā mema mai i Supabase.
fatal_not_in_members: Kāore tō wāhitau īmēra i rārangi i roto i te tūtohi mema.
fatal_start_error: I hapa te whakaara i te tono
fatal_unexpected: He hapa ohorere i te tīmatanga.
version_click_details: Pāwhiri mō ngā taipitopito putanga katoa
